questions.explanation: Weather is the day-to-day condition of atmosphere. Climate is the average weather over a long period (25+ years).

questions.text: Polar bears are adapted to live in cold climates.
questions.explanation: Polar bears have thick fur, layer of fat, and white color for camouflage in snowy polar regions.
A rain gauge is used to measure the amount of rainfall in a particular area.

questions.text: The climate of a place with high temperature and high rainfall is ________.
questions.explanation: Tropical climate is characterized by high temperature and high rainfall throughout the year.
